query:
-- Add real payment data from Excel (الجمالي = contract, المسدد = collected)
INSERT INTO payments (projectId, amount, description, paymentDate, type, status) VALUES
-- 495: collected 223650 of 745500
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='495'), 223650.00, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-06-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 3092: collected 422050 of 844100
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='3092'), 422050.00, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-08-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 514: collected 43470 of 217350
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='514'), 43470.00, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-03-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 3274: collected 192625 of 770500
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='3274'), 192625.00, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-05-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 3872: collected 257922 of 573160
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='3872'), 257922.00, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-09-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 2429: collected 28750 of 57500
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='2429'), 28750.00, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-01-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 3681: collected 69024 of 76693
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='3681'), 69024.15, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-10-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 3984: collected 0 of 391299
-- 4130: collected 221387 of 491970
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='4130'), 221386.50, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-11-01', 'milestone', 'received'),
-- 4138: collected 132423 of 397268
((SELECT id FROM projects WHERE code='4138'), 132422.50, 'دفعة مسددة', '2024-12-01', 'milestone', 'received');

SELECT p.code, p.name, p.totalContractValue, SUM(pm.amount) as collected
FROM projects p LEFT JOIN payments pm ON pm.projectId = p.id
GROUP BY p.id, p.code, p.name, p.totalContractValue;
